articles.description: Actor and singer Hilary Duff opened up about her first celebrity crush during a recent appearance on The Jennifer Hudson Show, revealing that she was a huge fan of former teen heartthrob Jonathan Taylor Thomas, according to People.

articles.description: Singer-actor Nick Jonas says his personal experience as a member of the Jonas Brothers helped him portray his latest character in the upcoming musical comedy 'Power Ballad', according to People.

articles.title: Britney handcuffed by police in dashcam footage - WATCH
articles.description: Newly surfaced dashcam footage captures Britney Spears' March DUI arrest, showing her interaction with officers after being pulled over for erratic driving. Despite admitting to a mimosa and taking medication, she later registered below the legal limit. Spears reached a plea deal, reducing the charge to 'wet reckless' and receiving probation.

articles.title: "Everyone hates him": Why analysts say Travis Kelce could be the most polarising TV personality since retiring from NFL
articles.description: Travis Kelce remains at the center of sports and entertainment conversations as his media future gains momentum through the highly successful “New Heights” podcast and a major Amazon deal. While analysts see him as a strong fit for broadcasting, fan reactions online remain sharply split between criticism and strong support. Beyond media speculation, Kelce also drew attention for a personal moment shared on his podcast with Rory McIlroy, where the emotional meaning of weddings was discussed.

articles.title: Why Rs 40 LPA earners don’t feel richer than Rs 20 LPA earners. CA explains the hidden reason
articles.description: High salaries do not always bring financial peace. Chartered Accountant Nitin Kaushik explains how lifestyle inflation traps urban professionals. Expenses rise with income, creating debt. Social media fuels comparison spending. Many buy things they do not need with borrowed money. True wealth is the gap between earnings and spending, not just salary figures.

articles.title: Who is Phyllis Gilliam? Georgie & Mandy’s First Marriage honors costume supervisor who died months after losing husband to cancer
articles.description: Phyllis Gilliam: Fans of Georgie & Mandy's First Marriage learned of Phyllis Gilliam's passing. She was a costume supervisor for the show. Gilliam's tribute appeared in the Season 2 finale. Her career spanned over three decades. She worked on many productions. Gilliam passed away on March 23, 2026. Her obituary detailed her life and career.

articles.title: Gisele Bundchen and Tom Brady back in spotlight after viral Gucci runway debut sparks frenzy
articles.description: Tom Brady surprised fans after making a bold runway debut at Gucci’s New York fashion show alongside major celebrities. The viral appearance quickly caught the attention of his ex-wife, Gisele Bundchen, who reportedly found the moment “fun to watch.” While Bundchen has moved on with her private life and marriage to Joaquim Valente, Brady continues drawing headlines through fashion appearances and ongoing dating rumors involving stars like Alix Earle, Irina Shayk, Sofia Vergara, and Kim Kardashian.

articles.title: "You're inviting people to.....": Divorce lawyer warns Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini to stay silent amid affair rumors
articles.description: Celebrity divorce lawyer James Sexton sparked online debate after sharing blunt advice about handling public scandals, with many linking his comments to ongoing rumors involving Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini. Sexton warned that early public statements during a PR crisis can create lasting damage and make controversies worse. While no allegations have been confirmed, social media speculation continues growing. The discussion also drew comparisons to the intense public scrutiny surrounding Travis Kelce and Taylor Swift’s highly watched relationship and ongoing wedding rumors.

articles.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce wedding overshadowed by explosive blackmail claims tied to Blake Lively lawsuit
articles.description: Taylor Swift has been pulled into fresh online controversy after viral rumors linked her to Blake Lively’s ongoing legal dispute with Justin Baldoni. Unverified claims and alleged leaked texts fueled blackmail speculation across social media. The drama comes as fans continue discussing Swift’s future with Travis Kelce and possible wedding plans. While no court documents confirm the allegations, the internet frenzy has intensified attention around Swift’s friendships, public image, and highly watched relationship with the Kansas City Chiefs star.

Speaking about his father Raj Babbar’s relationship with late actress Smita Patil and his strained bond with half-brother Prateik Smita Patil, Arya shared emotional memories, painful truths and his family’s efforts to move forward with dignity.

Over the years, Aishwarya Rai Bachchan, 52, has become one of India’s most recognisable and celebrated faces at Cannes. Therefore, fans were quick to notice her absence when L'Oreal Paris shared visuals from its latest Cannes campaign featuring several of its global ambassadors.

articles.title: Tejasswi Prakash Takes a Hilarious Dig at Neha Dhupia and Angad Bedi on Baby Planning in Upcoming Episode of Double Date with Karan Kundrra, reveals their own baby plans
articles.description: Fans are in for an entertaining and laughter-filled episode this Thursday as one of television’s most loved couples, Karan Kundrra and Tejasswi Prakash, appearing on Double Date hosted by power couple Neha Dhupia and Angad Bedi. Known for their candid chemistry and playful banter, Karan and Tejasswi brought their unfiltered selves to the chat show, opening up about their relationship, life as live-in partners, their journey after Bigg Boss, and plenty of untold secrets. But what truly stole the spotlight was Tejasswi’s witty and unexpected comeback during a conversation around marriage and kids. In a light-hearted moment, Neha Dhupia asked the couple, “When are you guys planning kids? Give us a year!” Without missing a beat, Tejasswi hilariously replied, “Plan karke bacche hone hote toh aapke hote plan karke?” Her spontaneous response left both Neha and Angad stunned before bursting into laughter. Joining the fun, Angad cheekily added, “I like this question!” while Neha responded, “Kuch logon ke plan karke bhi hote hain!” Keeping the banter alive, Tejasswi further joked, “Unplanned karke hum bhi wahi karenge lagta hai mujhe... lagta hai aisa hi hona hai!” The candid exchange perfectly captures the fun and comfort the two couples share, making the upcoming episode one of the most anticipated ones yet. From relationship confessions to funny personal anecdotes, the episode promises viewers a refreshing glimpse into Karan and Tejasswi’s dynamic beyond the spotlight. With their massive fan following and undeniable chemistry, Karan Kundrra and Tejasswi Prakash continue to remain one of the entertainment industry’s most adored couples, and this episode is expected to be a complete treat for their fans. The episode featuring Karan and Tejasswi will stream this Thursday on Neha Dhupia’s YouTube channel.
articles.source: Latest Movie Updates, Film News, Movie Reviews,pre

Advised by peers that the show is more mental than physical, she embraces the challenge as the youngest contestant, aiming to break her child artiste image and showcase her readiness to face fears and push limits.

articles.title: Main Vaapas Aaunga Trailer Launch: Vedang Raina Reacts on Being the Youngest Actor in Imtiaz Ali’s World of Mesmerising Romance: The most amazing thing that could have happened to me
articles.description: Imtiaz Ali’s Main Vaapas Aaunga is easily one of the most anticipated romantic films of recent times. Interestingly, it also makes Vedang Raina the youngest of the stars to be a part of the versatile filmmaker’s unforgettable romantic world. During the recently held trailer launch event, Vedang Raina reacted to being called the youngest hero in Imtiaz Ali’s world and described it as the “most amazing thing” to happen to him. “It makes me feel young and also very, very honoured. I mean, to be part of an Imtiaz Ali film, even at the age of whatever, would have been a privilege. This is a really interesting title, to be the youngest. But, you know, I keep saying it. It's the most amazing thing that could have happened to me, especially this early in my career. And I'd just like to thank you again,” he says. For the unknown, Vedang Raina plays the younger version of Naseeruddin Shah’s character in Main Vaapas Aaunga. During the trailer launch, the actor admitted feeling the pressure of playing the younger version of a legendary star. “I did feel the pressure when I was cast. I did feel the pressure when I heard I'm playing the younger version of Naseer sir to be a part of a film in which such esteemed actors, veterans are there, Diljit Paji. Definitely I took that pressure as a responsibility, and I hope people are happy,” he shared. Billed as a charming story of love and longing, Main Vaapas Aaunga also stars Diljit Dosanjh, Sharvari and Naseeruddin Shah. Directed by Imtiaz Ali, the film is scheduled to release in theatres on June 12.
articles.source: Latest Movie Updates, Film News, Movie Reviews,pre

articles.title: HR reveals reason why company lost loyal employee to boss in viral post: ‘We were willing to pay a stranger....’
articles.description: A viral tweet highlights a company's loss of a senior employee. The employee resigned after receiving a better offer elsewhere. The company was willing to pay a stranger 70% more but denied the existing employee a 20% raise. This lack of appreciation for loyalty and proven performance led to the departure.

articles.title: Cockroach Janta Party to Parasitic Front: How political memes are taking over the internet
articles.description: Online satire groups, the Cockroach Janta Party and National Parasitic Front, have surged in popularity following controversial remarks about unemployed youth. These movements, born from social media outrage, use parody manifestos and meme-driven campaigns to voice frustrations. Their rapid, participatory rise signals a new era of digital political expression in India.
